title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nike India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nike India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nike India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nike India:
Nike India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India!
